description: Baseline: MCP server starts, protocol version and version reported. Transport and resources missing from startup output.

issues: Transport not reported in non-verbose mode
Resources not shown in startup output
No actual MCP inspector validation yet - only startup checks

description: Fix: Always show transport and resources in MCP server startup output

asi.hypothesis: Making essential MCP info always visible improves compliance
asi.fix: Removed verbose-only check for transport and resources output
